rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDIE WESTPHAL HEROLD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Trial-Setting Orders, Or In The Alternative Vacate Trial-Setting Orders
rulings.Rulings: The motion to stay trial-setting orders, or in the alternative vacate trial-setting orders is granted. The trial of both the bifurcated issue of the Trustee's removal and the separate cross-petition for return of property are stayed pending the appeal of the Court's order directing respondent to report information. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest shall notify and court and opposing counsel no later than May 19, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
